description: Author failing tests for the per-guardrail scope field (scope: "integration" | "local", default local) parsed from the deterministic sidecar key and the prompt frontmatter, and the integration-guardrail-set filter on IReVerifier (an integration-scoped guardrail re-runs at every union; a distant non-colliding task's local guardrail re-runs only if the merge touched its files; a colliding sibling's local guardrail re-runs regardless - the B-3 split; the terminal gate runs the same integration set)
